page: Microsoft Azure DC8ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DCadsv6 server family. Powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 8 dedicated virtual CPUs and 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The underlying virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

For storage needs, the DC8ads_v6 includes a 307 GB local disk and supports Premium Storage capabilities for high-performance external disk attachments. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses, and there is no integrated GPU hardware on this instance type.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio provide predictable performance for workloads requiring consistent resource availability without the overhead of accelerated hardware. This server is suited for general-purpose workloads, relational databases, web serving, and application servers that benefit from local scratch storage and premium storage compatibility.
description: Microsoft Azure DC8ads_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine within the DCadsv6 family, powered by an AMD processor and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. This instance features 8 dedicated vCPUs paired with 32.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. Storage capabilities include a 307 GB local disk alongside compatibility with Premium Storage options, though it does not bundle complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPU hardware. The dedicated resource allocation ensures predictable performance, making this server a cost-efficient option for general-purpose applications. It is well-suited for workloads such as relational databases, application servers, web serving, and development environments requiring a balance of compute, memory, and local storage.
